MulLeMonotone(c: int, a: int, b: int)\n  requires c > 0\n  requires a <= b\n  ensures c * a <= c * b\n  decreases c\n{\n  if c == 1 {\n  } else {\n    MulLeMonotone(c - 1, a, b);\n    assert c * a == b);\n  var g := Gcd(a, b);\n  var pa := a / g;\n  var pb := b / g;\n  assert a == g * pa;\n  assert b == g * pb;\n  assert pa >= 1;\n  assert pb >= 1;\n  if pa >= pb {\n    MulLeMonotone(g, pb, pa);\n }\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":25874,"cache_read_input_tokens":19650,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":25874},"output_tokens":25,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e998bb53-3656-466a-9032-d529ce1938da","uuid":"599526c6-b623-478f-bd12-92b34bf03ff3"},{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01NLkUR19PbreCpTr9cauxT3","type":"tool_result","content":"File induction following the Gcd recursion.\nlemma GcdBound(a: int, b: int)\n  requires 0 < a < b\n  ensures Gcd(a, b) * 2 <= b\n  decreases b, a\n{\n  // Since a < b: a % b = a != 0, so Gcd(a, b) = Gcd(b, a)\n  assert a % b == a;\n  assert Gcd(a, b) == Gcd(b, a);\n\n  var r := b % a;\n  if r == 0 {\n    // Gcd(b, a) = a\n    assert Gcd(b, a) == a;\n    // b = a * (b/a) with b/a >= 2 (since b > a and b % a == 0)\n    var k := b / a;\n    assert b == a * k;\n    assert k >= 2;\n    assert a * 2 <= a * k;\n  } else {\n    // Gcd(b, a) = Gcd(a, r) where 0 < r < a\n    assert 0 < r && r < a;\n    assert Gcd(b, a) == Gcd(a, r);\n\n    // Gcd(r, a) = Gcd(a, r) since r < a implies r % a = r != 0\n    assert r % a == r;\n    assert Gcd(r, a) == Gcd(a, r);\n\n    // By induction: Gcd(r, a) * 2 <= a\n    GcdBound(r, a);\n\n    // Gcd(a, b) = Gcd(r, a), so Gcd(a, b) * 2 <= a <= b\n    assert Gcd(a, b) * 2 <= a;\n  }\n}\n\nmethod MaximumGCD(n: int) returns (result: int)\n  requires n >= 2\n  ensures exists a: int | 1 <= a && a < n :: exists b: int | a < b && b <= n :: Gcd(a, b) == result\n  ensures forall a: int | 1 <= a && a < n :: forall b: int | a < b && b <= n :: Gcd(a, b) <= result\n{\n  result := n / 2;\n\n  // Existence witness: Gcd(n/2, 2*(n/2)) = n/2\n  var wa := n / 2;\n  var wb := 2 * wa;\n  assert 1 <= wa && wa < n;\n  assert wa < wb && wb <= n;\n  assert wb % wa == 0;\n  assert Gcd(wb, wa) == wa;\n  assert Gcd(wa, wb) == wa;\n\n  // Upper bound\n  forall ai: int | 1 <= ai && ai < n\n    ensures forall bi: int | ai < bi && bi <= n :: Gcd(ai, bi) <= result\n  {\n    forall bi: int | ai < bi && bi <= n\n      ensures Gcd(ai, bi) <= result\n    {\n      GcdBound(ai, bi);\n    }\n
